raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, a charge of {$700.00} posted to my XXXX XXXX XXXX Credit Card for an online purchase. The merchandise was never successfully delivered. XXXX XXXX provided written confirmation stating XXXX XXXX, and I have documentation confirming the item was not delivered. 

I timely filed a billing dispute with Citi under the XXXX Credit Billing Act. Citi initially issued a temporary credit on XX/XX/XXXX. However, on XX/XX/XXXX, Citi reversed its position and denied the dispute, stating that the services or merchandise was provided as intended. 

Citi has not provided any proof of delivery, delivery confirmation, or evidence contradicting XXXX Depots written confirmation that delivery was unsuccessful. I requested documentation supporting Citis determination, including proof of delivery, and none was provided. 

As a result, I am being held responsible for {$700.00} for merchandise I never received. Interest has accrued on this balance while the dispute remains unresolved. 

This matter concerns improper denial of a billing dispute despite documented evidence of non-delivery.
